appraisal_events.evidence: « quand M. Verdurin avait dit que Swann ne lui revenait pas… il avait deviné celle de sa femme » ; « une impossibilité de les lui imposer… de l’y convertir entièrement » ; « c’est une abjuration qu’ils comprirent qu’on ne pourrait pas lui arracher. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The Verdurins register dislike and resist fully accepting Swann because he maintains an independent inner reserve and will not abjure contrary tastes; this functions as a local exclusionary judgment.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally edged out in the Verdurin circle, as their voiced dislike and inability to ‘convert’ him mark a refusal to fully include him.
